Put early points into durability so mistakes are recoverable.
Extract earlier runs instead of forcing risky clears.

stats.title: Cursed Gear Stats Guide
stats.subtitle: Understand all six core stats and use practical allocation paths for melee, technique, and hybrid play.

statCards.detail: Increases max HP and gives the safest early progression buffer for new players.
Boosts melee damage and supports weapon-first route scaling.
Improves cursed technique damage and supports ability-centered builds.
Improves stamina economy and smooths long combat rotations.
Strengthens defensive pressure tools such as block value and stamina damage interactions.
Increases movement speed and helps mobile routes execute cleaner repositioning.

cards.title: Beginner Safe Path
cards.description: Start with Durability, then branch into Physicality or Output based on your gear route.

cards.title: Melee Route
cards.description: Prioritize Durability and Physicality, then layer Awareness as mechanics improve.

cards.title: Technique Route
cards.description: Open with Durability, then scale Output and Efficiency once technique loops are active.

overview: Cursed Gear stat priorities should match the route you are actively playing.
Durability-first progression creates a stronger learning curve for early combat timing.
Preset paths are the fastest way to avoid random point spread mistakes.
tips: Avoid glass-cannon spreads before your parry and extraction consistency is stable.
Do not overvalue speed before survivability and baseline combat control.
Keep Awareness in your long-term plan because it supports defensive and pressure interactions.

builds.title: Cursed Gear Best Builds
builds.subtitle: Use practical starter builds to choose a clear route instead of spreading points at random.

cards.title: Safe Executioner Build
cards.description: Durability first and Physicality second for reliable melee progression.

cards.title: Projector Pressure Build
cards.description: Durability plus Dexterity or Awareness for faster tempo and gap-closing pressure.

cards.title: Manipulator Technique Build
cards.description: Durability early, then Output and Efficiency once techniques drive damage.

cards.title: Constructor Hybrid Build
cards.description: Balanced Physicality and Output with enough Durability to absorb mistakes.

overview: A strong Cursed Gear build defines engage timing, disengage timing, and extraction discipline.
Starter routes should prioritize consistency over highlight-only performance.
Compare builds by repeat completion quality and total Time secured.

rows: Can feel slower than high-tempo options.

tips: Do not copy flashy PvP setups before your core defense timings are stable.
The best beginner build is the one that survives while you learn systems.
As public data grows, this section can expand into a fully filterable build planner.

cards.description: The most important safety valve for preserving run progress.

overview: Cursed Gear expeditions can be played solo or with a party of up to four.

controlsCombat.title: Cursed Gear Controls & Combat Mechanics
controlsCombat.subtitle: Use keybind clarity and mechanic timing to improve consistency in PvE and PvP.

cards.title: Curse Dodge
cards.description: E + Q gives a stronger iframe-style dodge than basic movement alone.

cards.title: Parry
cards.description: E + F is critical for draining enemy stamina and turning defense into offense.

cards.title: Cursed Energy Timing
cards.description: Matching M1 with cursed energy creates stun and combo extension pressure.

cards.title: Sprint Attack
cards.description: Shift + M1 is a clean opener that new players should practice intentionally.

overview: Cursed Gear combat consistency improves when keybind intent is clear before fights begin.
Timing discipline matters more than button spam in both PvE and PvP.
A short training routine before live runs prevents long wipe streaks.
tips: Jumping carelessly is dangerous because you lose easy block access while airborne.
Timing discipline matters more than button spam in both PvE and PvP.
Ten focused minutes on a training dummy can save hours of failed live fights.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Cursed Gear

questions.question: Are there active Cursed Gear codes right now?
questions.answer: The Cursed Gear homepage code tracker currently shows no publicly confirmed active code and highlights official places to verify updates.

questions.question: What is the best first build path in Cursed Gear?
questions.answer: Most Cursed Gear players get cleaner early progression with durability-first setup, controlled expeditions, and earlier extractions.

questions.question: Which links should I check first for Cursed Gear updates?
questions.answer: Check Cursed Gear Discord announcements first, then the official Trello board for structured system references.

questions.question: How should I approach Cursed Gear grade progression?
questions.answer: Use milestone-based Cursed Gear progression with stable build updates at each grade jump instead of forcing risky spikes.

questions.question: How do Cursed Gear techniques fit into build planning?
questions.answer: Cursed Gear techniques should match your gear tempo and stat priorities, then scale through practical potency, haste, and efficiency upgrades.

questions.question: Why does Cursed Gear extraction discipline matter so much?
questions.answer: Cursed Gear extraction discipline secures Time and prevents wipe chains, which is the fastest route to consistent long-term growth.
